body.notes: Participation in IETF meetings constitutes agreement to the Note Well, which permits recording, transcription, and public archival of proceedings. See also BCP 78 (RFC 5378) and BCP 79 (RFC 8179) for IPR policies.

meta.title: 07 Scalability Considerations for Network Resource Partition
03 Common YANG Data Types for Traffic Engineering
08 IETF Network Slice Application in 3GPP 5G End-to-End Network Slice
09 Instantiation of IETF Network Slices in service providers networks
04 A YANG Data Model for Traffic Engineering Tunnels, Label Switched Paths and Interfaces
10 A YANG Data Model for Network Resource Partitions (NRPs)
05 A YANG Data Model for requesting path computation
06 A YANG Data Model for the IETF Network Slice Service
11 IETF Network Slice Topology YANG Data Model
12 Realization of Composite IETF Network Slices
